io.github.brilliantdirectories/brilliant.summary: Official MCP server for Brilliant Directories sites: manage members, posts, leads, and reviews from an agent.
useWhen: automating a Brilliant Directories membership site
managing directory members, leads, or reviews from a workflow
doNotUseWhen: the project does not use Brilliant Directories

io.github.copperline-labs/rendex-mcp.summary: Renders HTML, Markdown, or URLs into images, PDFs, and branded artifacts, with page extraction and watching, via the Rendex cloud API.
useWhen: generating PDFs or images from web content in an agent workflow
extracting or monitoring page content as rendered output
doNotUseWhen: documents must not be processed by a third-party cloud service

io.github.getnable/finops-mcp.summary: Local-first FinOps copilot that answers AWS, Azure, GCP, Kubernetes, and SaaS cost questions inside your editor.
useWhen: investigating cloud spend or cost anomalies during development
asking cost questions about AWS/Azure/GCP/Kubernetes without leaving the editor
doNotUseWhen: the project has no cloud infrastructure costs to analyze

io.github.kivanccakmak/yaver.summary: Phone-first local development MCP for Claude Code and Codex: pair a mobile device, then run, build, and deploy from the agent.
useWhen: driving mobile app run/build/deploy loops from a coding agent
testing on a paired physical phone during development
doNotUseWhen: the project has no mobile component

io.github.webmyc/respira-wordpress.summary: WordPress management MCP with 200+ tools and 16 builders, context-aware filtering, and SafeEdit protection for site changes.
useWhen: managing or building WordPress sites from an agent
bulk content operations on a WordPress installation
doNotUseWhen: the project does not involve WordPress

io.usefulapi/betterstack.summary: Hosted MCP for Better Stack Uptime: monitors, incidents, heartbeats, on-call schedules, and status pages.
useWhen: managing uptime monitors or incidents from an agent workflow
checking on-call and status-page state during operations work
doNotUseWhen: the project does not use Better Stack
operational data must not flow through a hosted third-party proxy

io.usefulapi/fireworks.summary: Hosted MCP for Fireworks AI: manage models, deployments, datasets, and fine-tuning jobs.
useWhen: operating Fireworks AI deployments or fine-tuning jobs from an agent
doNotUseWhen: the project does not use Fireworks AI

io.usefulapi/loops.summary: Hosted MCP for Loops: contacts, mailing lists, and transactional or event-driven email.
useWhen: automating email contacts, lists, or transactional sends via Loops
doNotUseWhen: the project does not use Loops for email

io.usefulapi/mixpanel.summary: Hosted MCP for Mixpanel: query events, funnels, retention, segmentation, and insights.
useWhen: querying product analytics (funnels, retention, segments) from an agent
doNotUseWhen: the project does not use Mixpanel
analytics data must not flow through a hosted third-party proxy

io.usefulapi/uploadcare.summary: Hosted MCP for Uploadcare: upload and store files, manage groups and webhooks.
useWhen: managing file uploads and storage via Uploadcare from an agent
doNotUseWhen: the project does not use Uploadcare
files must remain on the local machine

skills/algorithmic-art/SKILL.md.summary: Creates original algorithmic and generative art with p5.js using seeded randomness, flow fields, particle systems, and interactive parameter exploration.
useWhen: the user asks for generative or algorithmic art built with code
creating flow fields, particle systems, or parameterized visual sketches
doNotUseWhen: a static designed image is wanted rather than code-driven art

skills/brand-guidelines/SKILL.md.summary: Applies Anthropic's official brand colors and typography to artifacts that should carry Anthropic's look-and-feel.
useWhen: styling an artifact to match Anthropic brand standards
doNotUseWhen: the artifact belongs to a different brand or needs a custom identity

skills/canvas-design/SKILL.md.summary: Creates original posters, art pieces, and static visual designs as PNG or PDF using a structured design philosophy.
useWhen: the user asks for a poster, artwork, or polished static visual
doNotUseWhen: the output should be an interactive web page rather than a static design

skills/claude-api/SKILL.md.summary: Authoritative reference for the Claude API and Anthropic SDK: model ids, pricing, parameters, streaming, tool use, MCP, agents, caching, and migration.
useWhen: writing or reviewing code that calls the Claude/Anthropic API
answering model choice, pricing, or rate-limit questions for Claude
doNotUseWhen: the project targets a different LLM provider exclusively

skills/doc-coauthoring/SKILL.md.summary: Structured co-authoring workflow for documentation, proposals, technical specs, and decision docs, from context transfer to reader verification.
useWhen: writing documentation, specs, proposals, or decision docs collaboratively
doNotUseWhen: the text is a quick one-off message rather than a structured document

skills/docx/SKILL.md.summary: Creates, reads, edits, and manipulates Word (.docx) documents including tables of contents, headings, page numbers, and letterheads.
useWhen: any task where a Word document is the input or output
producing professional formatted documents
doNotUseWhen: plain markdown or text output is sufficient

skills/frontend-design/SKILL.md.summary: Design-lead guidance for distinctive, intentional UI: aesthetic direction, typography, and choices that avoid templated defaults.
useWhen: building new UI or reshaping an existing interface
the project needs a distinctive visual identity without a designer
doNotUseWhen: the project has no user interface

skills/internal-comms/SKILL.md.summary: Writes internal communications in company formats: status reports, leadership updates, newsletters, FAQs, and incident reports.
useWhen: drafting internal status updates, reports, or announcements
doNotUseWhen: the audience is external (marketing, public docs)

skills/mcp-builder/SKILL.md.summary: Guide for building high-quality MCP servers in Python (FastMCP) or TypeScript (MCP SDK), with tool design best practices.
useWhen: creating a new MCP server to integrate an external API or service
reviewing an MCP server design for tool quality
doNotUseWhen: an existing MCP server already covers the target service

skills/pdf/SKILL.md.summary: Full PDF toolkit: extract text and tables, merge, split, rotate, watermark, fill forms, encrypt/decrypt, extract images, and OCR scanned documents.
useWhen: any task involving reading, creating, or transforming PDF files
OCR of scanned documents or PDF form filling
doNotUseWhen: the document format is not PDF

skills/pptx/SKILL.md.summary: Creates, reads, edits, and combines PowerPoint (.pptx) presentations, including pitch decks and slide extraction.
useWhen: any task where a .pptx file is input or output
building slide decks or extracting content from presentations
doNotUseWhen: a document or web page fits better than slides

skills/skill-creator/SKILL.md.summary: Creates and improves Agent Skills: authoring from scratch, optimizing descriptions for triggering, and benchmarking skill performance.
useWhen: writing a new SKILL.md or improving an existing skill
testing whether a skill triggers reliably
doNotUseWhen: the task is using skills rather than authoring them

skills/slack-gif-creator/SKILL.md.summary: Creates animated GIFs optimized for Slack, with size constraints, validation tools, and animation concepts.
useWhen: the user asks for an animated GIF, especially for Slack
doNotUseWhen: a static image or video is wanted

skills/theme-factory/SKILL.md.summary: Styles artifacts (slides, docs, reports, landing pages) with 10 preset color/font themes or generates a new theme on the fly.
useWhen: applying a consistent visual theme to a generated artifact
doNotUseWhen: the artifact must follow an existing brand system exactly

skills/web-artifacts-builder/SKILL.md.summary: Builds elaborate multi-component claude.ai HTML artifacts with React, Tailwind CSS, and shadcn/ui, including state management and routing.
useWhen: creating complex interactive artifacts needing components, state, or routing
doNotUseWhen: a simple single-file HTML/JSX artifact is enough

skills/webapp-testing/SKILL.md.summary: Tests local web applications with Python Playwright scripts: verifying frontend behavior, debugging UI, capturing screenshots and browser logs.
useWhen: verifying a web app change actually works in a browser
debugging UI behavior or collecting browser console logs
doNotUseWhen: the project is a pure library or CLI with no web surface

skills/xlsx/SKILL.md.summary: Reads, creates, edits, and converts spreadsheets (.xlsx, .xlsm, .csv, .tsv): formulas, formatting, charts, and data cleaning.
useWhen: any task where a spreadsheet is the primary input or output
computing formulas, charting, or cleaning tabular data
doNotUseWhen: the data is unstructured text rather than tabular
